thread.title: Sister of Mica Miller honors her legacy, advocates for coercive control law
thread.title_full: Sister of Mica Miller honors her legacy, advocates for coercive control law

author: Gianna Forbis
title: Sister of Mica Miller honors her legacy, advocates for coercive control law
text: {p}{ } Proof of concept AI assistant.{/p}{p}It has been almost seven months since the death of 30-year old Mica Miller.{/p}{p}She is the estranged wife to John Paul Miller, a pastor at Solid Rock Baptist church in Myrtle Beach. {/p}{p}The sister of Mica Miller, Anna Francis, sat down with ABC15 for the first time to talk about her sister and her legacy. {/p}{blockquote}She was obviously wonder woman every year for Halloween, so our sister who has that one-year-old, she dressed her up as wonder woman for Halloween this year just to keep her still with us,” said Francis. {/blockquote}{p}Mica died by suicide on April 27 in Robeson county, North Carolina. {/p}{p}{strong}READ MORE:{a href=\"https://wpde.com/news/local/family-attorney-reveals-documents-given-to-fbi-following-death-of-mica-miller-activity-investigation-john-paul-miller-solid-rock-church-exclusive-journals-certificate-no-criminal-charges-law-enforcement#\" target=\"_blank\" title=\"https://wpde.com/news/local/family-attorney-reveals-documents-given-to-fbi-following-death-of-mica-miller-activity-investigation-john-paul-miller-solid-rock-church-exclusive-journals-certificate-no-criminal-charges-law-enforcement#\"} Family attorney reveals documents given to FBI following death of Mica Miller{/a}{/strong}{/p}{p}Her death has become harder and harder for her family to fathom, including her sister Anna, as the holidays draw near. {/p}{blockquote}When I was thinking about the holidays and stuff, Mica especially during thanksgiving, she would always be the person during dinner would stop everyone and say, 'okay everybody we are gonna go around the table, and you're gonna say what you are thankful for,'\" said Francis. {/blockquote}{p}Francis said her love for the gospel continues to pour out through her siblings each day. {/p}{blockquote}No matter what you told her you'd done present, past, future, she said its alright. The grace of God is way bigger than anything you are going through,\" said Francis. {/blockquote}{p}Months after her death in April at a state park in North Carolina, her family still struggles to make the most of life without her.{/p}{p}{strong}TRENDING:{a href=\"https://wpde.com/news/local/michael-mclellan-escape-deputy-crash-sentenced-life-murderr-lumberton-teen-hania-aguilar-before-after-court-robeson-county-north-carolina#\" target=\"_blank\" title=\"https://wpde.com/news/local/michael-mclellan-escape-deputy-crash-sentenced-life-murderr-lumberton-teen-hania-aguilar-before-after-court-robeson-county-north-carolina#\"} Hania Aguilar's killer used homemade key in escape attempt before & after sentencing: RCSO{/a}{/strong}{/p}{blockquote}Even birthdays right now all my siblings who have had a birthday since Mica passed, they don't even wanna celebrate because there is someone else missing,\" said Francis. {/blockquote}{p}They continue to fight the battle they say Mica had to fight alone.{/p}{p}At a news conference in June, Mica's attorney Regina Ward advocated for a law in Mica's honor.{/p}{p}She said Mica's journals chronicled examples of quote: \"abusive coercive control.\"{/p}{blockquote}Every time you put your truth out and someone tries to say 'that's not the truth,' just don't give up really, because that happened to Mica so much.Her word didn't really mean that much, what was going on in her life, and behind closed doors,\" said Francis. {/blockquote}{p}Wonder Woman was a Halloween costume for Mica, but the family and their attorney said they continue to wear her cape to get the coercive control law passed. {/p}{blockquote}We will continue to be her hands, her feet, her heart, everything to continue helping all those people she really cared for,\" said Francis. {/blockquote}{p}The family says they are also going to be holding more events in the future, such as another benefit concert. {/p}{p}Mica's estranged husband John Paul Miller was never charged or arrested in any crimes relating to Mica or her death. {/p}{p}GRAND STRAND: SATURDAY - Mostly sunny, breezy, and cool. HIGH: 60{ }{a href=\"http://wpde.com/weather/grand-strand-forecast/grand-strand-forecast-01-22-2018\" target=\"_blank\" title=\"http://wpde.com/weather/grand-strand-forecast/grand-strand-forecast-01-22-2018\"}View the 10-Day Forecast here{/a}.{/p}{p}INLAND: SATURDAY - Mostly sunny and cool.
